scene.message: Nanjo: So this voice is...{wait_fr:32}{nl} Sonomura's mother...!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...{wait_fr:16}...{wait_fr:16}...{wait_fr:16}...{wait_fr:16}...{waitkey}{ret}
What will you do?{nl} {ctl0e:18}{ret}
Maki's Mother: What...?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Let me explain{nl} from the beginning.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ah! The dimensional{nl} passage is vanishing...!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Ma'am, we've gotta{nl} go after Kandori.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: I understand.{nl} Wait just a moment!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ma'am...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: Yes?{nl} There's no time - hurry.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: .........{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mother: Off you go,{nl} everyone! Take care!{waitkey}{ret}
